title: Lifesteal Engine
description: Server-side Lifesteal with configurable PvP heart loss, revival system, anti-farm, and combat-log punishment
body:
# Lifesteal Engine

A configurable **server-side Lifesteal mod** for modern Fabric versions.

Players can lose and gain hearts through PvP, use revival mechanics, and enable anti-abuse systems like anti-farm cooldowns and combat-log punishment.

## Features

- Lifesteal hearts system (configurable max hearts)
- Optional **PvP-only heart loss**
- Optional **ban on zero hearts** (duration configurable)
- Optional **revival system** with downed state
- Revival Totem support
- Anti-farm system (enable/disable + cooldown duration)
- Combat tagging + optional logout death
- Respawn protection
- Heart item mode and admin commands
- Leaderboard and player stats commands

## Server/Client

The mod is completely **server-side** and you do not need to install it on the client


## Commands

Base command:
- `/lifesteal ...` (admin permission required)

Main options:
- Hearts: get/set/max
- Ban: enable + duration
- Revival: enable + give
- Heart item mode: enable + give
- Anti-farm: enable + duration
- PvP-only heart loss: enable
- Combat-log system: enable + duration
- Respawn protection: enable + duration
- Leaderboard + stats

## Combat Log System

When enabled:
- A player enters combat when damaged by another player (direct or indirect).
- Logging out while tagged can kill the player.
- Tag duration is configurable (default: 15s).
- Players receive chat messages when combat starts and ends.

## Permissions

Admin commands require operator-level permissions.

## Compatibility

- Fabric Loader: `>= 0.19.1`
- Minecraft: `26.1.2`
- Java: `25+`

## License

MIT
